tagline: Where Every Cup Tells a Story
description: Welcome to Caffeine Co., your neighborhood coffee sanctuary. We craft exceptional coffee experiences in a warm, inviting atmosphere designed for connection, creativity, and comfort.
specialty: Single-Origin Ethiopian Yirgacheffe — bright, floral notes with a silky body, roasted fresh daily.

pros.title: Perfect for Studying
pros.description: Quiet zones with ample outlets and fast Wi-Fi make us a favorite among students.

pros.title: Remote Workspace
pros.description: Spacious tables, ergonomic seating, and a calm ambiance ideal for remote work.

pros.title: Community Hub
pros.description: Weekly open-mic nights and local art displays foster a vibrant community spirit.

pros.title: Sustainably Sourced
pros.description: Every bean is ethically sourced from fair-trade farms around the world.

pros.title: Expert Baristas
pros.description: Our certified baristas craft each drink with precision and passion.

pros.title: Curated Sound
pros.description: Hand-picked music sets the mood — from jazz mornings to lo-fi afternoons.

discountMessage: Welcome to the Caffeine Co. family! Enjoy {discount}% off your first visit.
